inputs.text: Main thoda bahut bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sir dard hai aur thoda kamzor bhi mehsoos ho raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, the symptoms are not specific enough to suggest typhoid at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise increase in fever and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation can be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever can cause fever, the pattern of fever and abdominal symptoms suggest other diagnoses

inputs.text: Ab toh mere bukhar bahut tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gayi hai aur main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the overall clinical picture suggests typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause high fever, but the presence of diarrhea after constipation and severe weakness points towards typhoid

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, thakaan mahsoos ho rahi hai aur pet dard bhi badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, exhaustion, and abdominal pain confirm the diagnosis of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the persistence of symptoms and the presence of bruising

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms and the presence of bruising
